content.json:
## Pipeline KPIs — ${environment}
Last 12 hours. Refresh with the toolbar button above.

content.title: Pipeline Success Rate (12 h)
content.query:
ADFPipelineRun
| where TimeGenerated > ago(12h)
| summarize total = count(), succeeded = countif(Status == "Succeeded"), failed = countif(Status == "Failed") by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), PipelineName
| extend success_rate = round(todouble(succeeded) / total * 100, 1)
| project TimeGenerated, PipelineName, total, succeeded, failed, success_rate
| order by TimeGenerated desc

content.title: Last Successful Ingestion per Source
content.query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where OperationName in ("PutBlob", "PutBlock")
| where Uri contains "/bronze/"
| extend source = tostring(split(Uri, "/")[3])
| summarize last_write = max(TimeGenerated), file_count = count() by source
| extend age_hours = round(datetime_diff('hour', now(), last_write), 1)
| extend status = iff(age_hours > 6, "STALE", "OK")
| project source, last_write, age_hours, file_count, status
| order by age_hours desc

content.json:
## Data Quality Violations
Pulled from `silver.dq_results` via Synapse Serverless SQL. Shows ERROR and WARNING rule failures for the last 7 days.

content.title: DQ Rule Failures (last 7 days)
content.query:
SELECT TOP 200
    run_timestamp,
    table_name,
    rule_name,
    severity,
    passed,
    failing_count
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'silver/dq_results/**',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'gold_adls',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) WITH (
    run_id        VARCHAR(64),
    table_name    VARCHAR(128),
    rule_name     VARCHAR(128),
    severity      VARCHAR(16),
    passed        BIT,
    failing_count BIGINT,
    run_timestamp VARCHAR(50)
) AS dq
WHERE passed = 0
  AND TRY_CAST(run_timestamp AS DATETIME2) >= DATEADD(DAY, -7, GETUTCDATE())
ORDER BY run_timestamp DESC

content.json:
## Tier Row Counts
Gold table row counts from `silver._table_registry` (written by the Silver→Gold Spark job on each run).

content.title: Gold Table Freshness & Row Counts
content.query:
SELECT
    table_name,
    owner_team,
    FORMAT(TRY_CAST(last_refreshed_at AS DATETIME2), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') AS last_refreshed_at,
    row_count,
    sla_by_utc,
    CASE
        WHEN TRY_CAST(last_refreshed_at AS DATETIME2) < DATEADD(HOUR, -26, GETUTCDATE()) THEN 'STALE'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS freshness_status,
    description
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'silver/_table_registry/**',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'gold_adls',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) WITH (
    table_name        VARCHAR(128),
    owner_team        VARCHAR(128),
    last_refreshed_at VARCHAR(50),
    row_count         BIGINT,
    sla_by_utc        VARCHAR(10),
    description       VARCHAR(512)
) AS reg
ORDER BY table_name
